raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu/taſaka tas KUNGS
Zebaot/ tas Israëſta Deews: Ka-
pelhz darrat juhs to leelu Launu-
mu prett juhfahm Dwehtelehm?
ta iſdeldeti tohp juhfu Starpâ
Wihrs un Seewa/ Behrns un
Sibſchamajs no Juhda Wid-
duſ/ ta ka juhs neneeka pahrt
atlizzinajat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un apkaitinajat manni
zaur juhfu Rohkas Darbeem/
un kwehpinaſat zitteem Dee-
weim Egiptes-Semmê / turp
juhs eſfat gahjuſchi par Swe-
ſchineekem miſt/ tadeht ka juhs
paſchi iſdeldatees/ un tohpat par
Lahstu/ un Neewaschanu ſtarp
wiſfahm Semmes Tautahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Effeeet juhs aismirfuschi to
Blehdibu juhfu Tehwu/ un tahs
Blehraas to Kehnizu no Juhda/
un winno Seewu Blehraas/ un
juhsas Blehraas/ un juhfu See-
wu Blehraas/ ko tee irr darrijschi
eekſch tahs Semmes Juhda/ un
Jerusaſemes Eelaas?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tomehr tee lihds scho-
deun ne irr ſagrauſti/ un ne bih-
ſahs/ nedß staiga eekſch man-
nas Bautlibas/ un mannoß Lik-
kumôs/ ko es juhfu Preekſcha/
un juhfu Tehwu Preekſcha efmu
dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ta takka tas
KUNGS Zebaot/ tas Israëta
Deews: Reds/ Es zelſchn fawu
Waigu par Launu prett jums/
iſdeldeschn wiſfu Juhdu.
Un es atjemschu tohs At-
uß no Juhda/ kas fawu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Waigu irr greesufchi Egip
Semmê eet par Sweſchi
keem tur miſt/ un teem taps
ſeem Egiptes-Semmê Gale
rihts/ zaur Sohbinn tee kritti
zaur Baddu taps teem E
darrihts/ tik labbi Maseem
Leeleem/ zaur Sohbinn un z
Baddu tee nomirs/ un taps
Nolahdefchanu/ par Iſtrubzt
ſchanu/ par Lahſtu/ un par D
waschanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es peemekleschu to
kas Egiptes-Semmê dſihwo/
ka es Jerusaſemi eſmu peen
lejs zaur Sohbinu/zaur Bad
un zaur Mehr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta ka neweens atsbel
no teem Atliffufscheem no J
da/ kas atlizzinati irr nahku
us Egiptes-Semmi par S
ſchineekem tur miſt/ ka tee w
retn atgreestees us to Sen
Juhda/ uhs kurrenes win
Dwehfele lauschahs atgreeste
un tur dſihwoht/ jo teem ne bu
atgreestees/ bes ween teem/
aisbehg.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Jeremiju
wiſti Wihti/ kas finnaja faw
Seewas zitteem Deeweem kw
pinajam/ un wiſas Seewa
kas tur stahweja leela Pulb
lihds ar wiſſeim Laudim/ kas
aiptes-Semmê eekſch Patr
dſihwoja/ un tazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz ta Wahrdã/ ko
uhs nuums eſti runnajs eekſch
KUNGA Wahrdã/ mehs tew
gribbam klaufiht.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
